description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:4.9-jdk8 Docker image, set the GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false, and configure a cache with key $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME that caches .gradle, build, and plugin/build with a push policy. Add a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository's .gradle directory. In the build stage add a build job that runs "gradle clean --build-cache pluginPackaging", stores the plugin/build directory as an artifact that expires in 1 day, and uses the defined cache. In the test stage add a test job that runs "gradle test" on all branches except master, and an analyse job that runs only on the master branch and executes "gradle sonarqube". In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on tags and executes "gradle bintrayUpload".
